search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Manage search indexes, API keys and usage for this organization.
search.noIndexes: No search indexes yet. Create your first one to get started.
search.noIndexesDescription: Search indexes store your data and power search queries. Create one to get started.
search.selectIndex: Select an index to manage its API keys.

importJobsPage.title: Import Jobs
importJobsPage.description: Recent document import and sync activity from the ingest buffer.

createIndex.title: Create search index
createIndex.description: Provisions a search collection and alias scoped to this organization.
createIndex.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes. Used in API paths and as collection alias.
createIndex.schemaHelp: JSON array of field definitions. The 'tenant_id' field is added automatically.
createIndex.error: Could not create index. Please try again.
createIndex.errorsCount: {count, plural, one {# field has an error} other {# fields have errors}}
createIndex.noFields: No fields yet — add one or pick a template.
createIndex.noSortableHint: Enable Sort on a numeric field first
createIndex.tenantHint: tenant_id is added automatically for isolation.

tooltips.displayName: Human-readable name shown in the dashboard. Does not affect the API.
tooltips.slug: Used in API paths and as the search collection alias. Lowercase letters, digits and dashes only.
tooltips.fields: Define the columns of your search collection. Fields can be made facetable, sortable, or optional.
tooltips.facet: Allow users to filter and group by this field (e.g. categories, tags, brand).
tooltips.optional: The field is allowed to be missing on documents. Required fields must be present in every document.
tooltips.sort: Allow sorting on this field (numeric fields can always be sorted).
tooltips.defaultSort: Field used to order results when no explicit sort is given. Must be numeric.
tooltips.json: Edit the schema as raw JSON. Switching back to the visual builder validates and re-syncs your changes.
tooltips.idField: Recommended unique identifier. AACsearch uses this as the primary key for upserts.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Search keys are validated by our backend before queries are executed. Admin credentials never leave the server.
apiKeys.createDescription: The raw key is shown once. Store it securely.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.revealOnce: Copy this key now. You will not be able to see it again.
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create your first API key to start integrating search into your application.
apiKeys.revokeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to revoke "{name}"? Clients using this key will stop working immediately.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Track search usage, top queries, zero-results, and trends.
analytics.retentionBanner: Your {plan} plan retains analytics data for {days} days. Select a shorter period to see data.
analytics.noDataDescription: Analytics data will appear once your search indexes start receiving queries.
analytics.noLatencyData: Latency data will appear after search queries are processed.
analytics.noFailedQueries: No failed queries in this period.

widget.description: Configure and customize your search widget. Set up filters, autocomplete, voice search, and embed it on your site.
widget.comingSoonDescription: The widget configuration wizard is being built. Check back soon for filters, autocomplete, voice search, and embed options.
widget.installStep1: Paste the snippet before the closing </body> tag.
widget.installStep2: Replace with a scoped search key for production.
widget.installStep3: The widget renders inside an element with id="aac-search".
widget.installStep4: Test by pressing <kbd>Ctrl+K</kbd> or <kbd>⌘K</kbd> on your site.
widget.installScriptDesc: Copy the snippet below and paste it into your website's HTML.
widget.installNpmDesc: Install the AACsearch Widget package for programmatic usage.
widget.installReactDesc: Use the React component for seamless integration with your React app.
widget.verifyDesc: Check that your widget is sending analytics events.
widget.verifySearchesFound: searches recorded in the last 7 days
widget.verifyFailed: No widget events detected yet. Make sure the widget is installed and users are interacting with it.
widget.advancedSDKDocsDesc: Full API reference, guides, and examples
widget.advancedInstantSearchDesc: React, Vue, Angular, and vanilla JS
widget.autocompleteDesc: Configure search-as-you-type suggestions and autocomplete behavior.
widget.voiceDesc: Configure voice search for the widget.
widget.voiceFallback: Fallback message if browser not supported
widget.analyticsWidgetDesc: Search metrics from the widget installation.

configurator.pageDescription: Set up your search in 3 simple steps. Choose a data source, configure your schema, and fine-tune search behavior.
configurator.step1Description: Choose an existing search index to configure.
configurator.step2Description: Auto-detect fields and configure search, facet, and sort behavior.
configurator.step3Description: Fine-tune how search works: which fields are searchable, their weights, and ranking options.
configurator.sourceCSVDesc: Upload a CSV file with up to 500K rows. Column headers become fields.
configurator.sourceJSONDesc: Upload a JSON file with an array of objects.
configurator.sourceCMSDesc: Connect WordPress, WooCommerce, PrestaShop, or other CMS.
configurator.sourceAPIDesc: Push data programmatically via our REST API.
configurator.schemaEmptyHint: Upload a data source or click Auto-Detect to get started.
configurator.noStringFields: No text fields available. Add string-type fields to enable search.
configurator.facetNoneSelected: No facet fields configured. Click "Add all fields" to configure facets.
configurator.facetNoFieldsHint: Mark fields as Facet in the Schema step to enable facet configuration.
configurator.step4Description: Configure how search facets appear and behave. Reorder, rename, and set display options.
configurator.step5Description: Review your configuration and customize widget appearance.
configurator.noIndexesHint: Create a search index first from the Search section.
configurator.createIndexHint: Need a new index? Create one from the Search section.
configurator.embedHint: Copy this snippet and paste it into your website's HTML to embed the search widget.
configurator.facetSettingsDesc: Configure which fields appear as filters in the search widget.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Past {days} days
overview.quotaWarning: You've used {percent}% of your search quota. Upgrade your plan to avoid disruption.
overview.quotaExceeded: You've exceeded your search quota ({percent}%). Some features may be limited.
overview.noDataDescription: Data will appear once your search indexes start receiving queries.

activity.keyRevoked: {count, plural, one {# API key} other {# API keys}} for "{name}"

overview.viewAnalyticsDesc: Track search usage and top queries
overview.noSearchesYet: You haven't sent any searches yet
overview.emptyStateDescription: Let's get started with your first search index.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Complete the steps below to start using search.
gettingStarted.allDoneDesc: All onboarding steps are complete. You can now use search.
gettingStarted.step1Desc: Create your first search index to store and organize your data.
gettingStarted.step2Desc: Generate a connector token to connect your data source.
gettingStarted.step3Desc: Sync your data from your CMS or other sources.
gettingStarted.step4Desc: Perform a test search to verify your setup.
gettingStarted.step5Desc: Create an API key to allow search requests from your application.
gettingStarted.step6Desc: Embed the search widget on your storefront.
gettingStarted.planCtaDesc: Upgrade your plan for higher limits and more features.
gettingStarted.step7Desc: Track search performance, clicks, and user behavior.
gettingStarted.step8Desc: Fine-tune search ranking with synonyms, boosts, and rules.

recommendations.description: Configure AI-powered product recommendations including similar items, personalized suggestions, and GraphRAG.
recommendations.comingSoonDescription: AI-powered recommendations are being built. Check back soon for similar items, personalized suggestions, and GraphRAG-powered explanations.
recommendations.pickProduct: Pick a product to see recommendations
recommendations.selectProduct: Select a product from the search results to preview its recommendations
recommendations.neo4jDisconnected: Recommendation engine is not connected. Configure Neo4j to enable recommendations.

stats.recommendationsServedDesc: All time via widget and API
stats.popularItemsEmpty: No popular items yet. Start adding products to see trends.
stats.trendingNowEmpty: No trending items yet. Data appears as users interact with products.

settings.title: Recommendation Settings
settings.countHint: Number of recommendations to return per request (1-100)
settings.fieldWeightsHint: How much each field contributes to similarity scoring
settings.personalizationModelDesc: Configure how personalization learns from user behavior data
settings.sourceEventsHint: Which user actions are used to build personalization profiles
settings.decayFactorHint: How quickly older events lose influence (lower = faster decay)
settings.minEventsPerUserHint: Minimum events required before personalization is applied

graphRag.title: GraphRAG Recommendations
graphRag.description: Ask a natural language question and get AI-powered product recommendations with explanations.
graphRag.noResults: No recommendations found for your query.
graphRag.error: Failed to get recommendations. Please try again.

analytics.modeDescription: Choose how personalized recommendations are generated
analytics.profileDescription: Behavioral profile built from click, search, and filter events
analytics.noProfileDescription: User interactions are being collected. Profile appears after the first click, search, or conversion event.
analytics.recommendationsDescription: Showing {{count}} recommendations based on user profile
analytics.errorDescription: Failed to generate recommendations. Check analytics data configuration.
analytics.noRecommendationsDescription: Not enough analytics data to generate personalized recommendations.

overview.title: Personalization Overview
overview.noDataDescription: Collect analytics data to see personalization metrics.

test.title: Test Personalization
test.description: Enter a user ID to see what personalized results they would receive, compared to baseline trending results.
test.noProfileDescription: This user has no events yet. Check back after they interact with search results.
test.personalizedDescription: Recommendations tailored to this user's behavior
test.noPersonalizedDescription: Not enough user data to generate personalized suggestions.
test.baselineDescription: Top trending products regardless of user
test.errorDescription: Could not generate test results. Check analytics data.
test.readyToTestDescription: Enter a user ID above and click Test to see how personalization changes their search results.

segments.title: User Segments
segments.description: Define and manage user segments based on behavioral analytics data.
segments.createDialogDescription: Define criteria for a new custom user segment based on engagement levels.
segments.editDialogDescription: Modify the criteria and metadata for this segment.
segments.noStats: No stats yet — feed analytics data first.
segments.noCustomSegmentsDesc: Define segments based on user engagement levels, then see how many users match each criteria.

importJobs.title: Import Jobs
importJobs.description: Recent document import and sync activity from the ingest buffer.
importJobs.empty: No import activity in the last 7 days.
importJobs.emptyDescription: Import jobs appear here when you sync data from your CMS or upload documents.
importJobs.retryError: Failed to retry batches. Please try again.

upload.title: Upload File
upload.dropzone: Drag & drop a JSON or CSV file here, or click to browse
upload.errorInvalidJson: Invalid JSON: expected an array of objects
upload.errorInvalidCsv: Invalid CSV: file must have a header row

preview.title: Search Preview
preview.description: Test search queries against this index and inspect the raw results.
preview.noResults: Run a query to see results here.

relevance.title: Relevance
relevance.description: Manage synonyms, curations, and search result rankings.

synonyms.title: Synonyms
synonyms.description: Configure search synonyms. When a user searches for the synonym term, results for the root term are shown instead.
synonyms.empty: No synonyms configured yet. Add a synonym pair to get started.
synonyms.emptyDescription: Synonyms map different search terms to the same root word, expanding your search coverage.
synonyms.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this synonym pair?

curations.title: Curations
curations.description: Pin or hide products for specific search queries to manually control search results.
curations.empty: No curation rules yet. Add a rule to get started.
curations.emptyDescription: Curation rules let you pin or hide specific products for search queries to fine-tune results.
curations.dialogDescription: Enter the search query and product IDs to pin or hide.
curations.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this curation rule?

connector.title: Connectors
connector.subtitle: Connect PrestaShop, Bitrix, or push docs directly via API
connector.runSyncDesc: Trigger a full sync to index all products from your CMS.
connector.syncTriggerHint: Open your CMS admin panel and click 'Full sync' in the AACsearch module.

configStep1.prestashop: Paste the API URL into the AACsearch module settings in your PrestaShop admin.
configStep1.bitrix: Paste the API URL into the AACsearch module settings in your Bitrix admin.
configStep1.directApi: Use the API URL and token as the base URL and bearer token for your REST calls.

configStep2.prestashop: Paste the connector token into the module settings field.
configStep2.bitrix: Paste the connector token into the module settings field.
configStep2.directApi: Include the token in the Authorization header: Bearer <token>

connector.prestashopDesc: Full sync for products, categories, stock
connector.directApiDesc: Push documents directly via REST API

shopify.title: E-commerce Store
shopify.desc: Sync products from your e-commerce platform. Connect stores via OAuth.
shopify.noStores: No stores connected. Connect an online store to sync products.
shopify.disconnectWarning: This will remove all synced products and stop future syncs. This action cannot be undone.
shopify.noSyncHistory: No sync history yet. Trigger a sync to see results here.

connector.activeConnectorsDesc: Connector tokens and their heartbeat status
connector.noConnectors: No connectors yet. Click 'Set up' on a source above.
connector.tokenCopyWarning: Save this key — we can't show it again after you close this window
connector.testFailed: Connection failed — check your module configuration
connector.description: Manage the CMS connector token and handshake status.
connector.noConnectorKeys: No connector keys. Create an API key with 'connector_write' scope in the API Keys tab.
connector.revokeError: Failed to revoke token. Please try again.
connector.retryError: Failed to retry batches. Please try again.

wizard.noIndex: No index available. Create an index first.

documents.empty: No documents in this index yet
documents.emptyDescription: Upload a CSV or use the API to add documents to this index.
documents.importCsvDescription: Select a CSV file to import documents. The first row must contain column headers matching the schema fields.
documents.parseError: Found {count} parsing error(s) in the CSV
documents.editDocumentDescription: Edit the document fields below. Changes will be upserted.
documents.bulkDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {count} document(s)? This action cannot be undone.
documents.deleteByFilterMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all documents matching "{filterBy}"? This action cannot be undone.
documents.bulkEditDescription: Set a field value for all {count} selected documents

files.name: Name
files.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

playground.title: Search Playground
playground.description: Test advanced search queries against your index with all available options.
playground.lastQueryRestored: Last query restored from previous session.
playground.noIndexes: No indexes available. Create one first.

indexActions.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone. All indexed data will be lost.
indexActions.reindexConfirmMessage: Trigger a full reindex for "{name}"? This will reprocess all documents from the connector.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: RAG question-answering over your documents and catalogs
knowledge.sourcesDesc: CMS and file sources for this space
knowledge.jobsAndMetricsDesc: Operational visibility for ingestion and graph builds
knowledge.ragAskDesc: Hybrid retrieval with citations from your space
knowledge.question: Question
knowledge.permissionDenied: You do not have permissions to create spaces
knowledge.noSpaceSelected: Select a space and enter a question
knowledge.questionPlaceholder: What products mention API key rotation?
knowledge.graphExplainDesc: Inspect graph neighborhood for your query
knowledge.noPermissionSources: You do not have permissions to create sources
knowledge.selectSpaceAndSource: Select space and provide source name
knowledge.noPermissionIngest: You do not have permissions to ingest files
knowledge.selectSpaceAndGraphQuery: Select a space and enter graph query

collection.title: Collection
collection.noDocumentsDesc: Push documents via the Connector API or SDK.

schemaEditor.importDialogDesc: Paste a JSON array of field definitions to replace the current field list.
schemaEditor.importMustBeArray: Input must be a JSON array.
schemaEditor.invalidJson: Invalid JSON. Please check your input.
schemaEditor.diffDesc: Review the differences between the draft and saved schema.
schemaEditor.settingsDesc: Configure advanced field options. These are stored locally until you save.
schemaEditor.reindexWarning: Changes to the schema require a full reindex. This may take several minutes for large collections.

collection.useApiKeys: Authenticate requests using an API key.
collection.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete this index and all its documents.
collection.reindexDescription: Trigger a full reindex with zero-downtime alias swap. Documents are rebuilt from the database.
collection.confirmReindexDesc: This will rebuild all documents from the database. The search index will remain available during the process via alias swap.
collection.reindexIdle: No active reindex job. Click below to start a full reindex.
collection.reindexWarningDesc: For large collections, this may take a while. You can leave this page and come back later.
collection.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All documents will be permanently lost.
collection.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All documents will be permanently removed.
collection.noApiKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to use these examples.

vectorSearch.description: Search by meaning, not just keywords.

hybridSearch.description: Combine keyword + semantic for best results.

semanticSearch.placeholder: Ask a question about your data...

models.description: Configure embedding models for vector and hybrid search.

geoSearch.description: Search by location with radius filtering.

conversationalSearch.description: Ask questions and get AI-generated answers from your data.

voiceSearch.description: Search by speaking. Audio is transcribed automatically.

imageSearch.description: Search by uploading an image. AI describes it before searching.

stemming.title: Stemming Overrides
stemming.description: Manage stemming overrides for fine-grained text matching. Control which words map to which root forms.
stemming.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this stemming override?
stemming.emptyDescription: Stemming overrides map variant word forms to a common root. Add overrides to improve search matching for domain-specific terms.

stopwords.description: Words in this list are ignored during search. Use it to filter out common words like articles and prepositions.
stopwords.title: Stopwords
stopwords.emptyDescription: Stopwords are common words ignored during search to improve relevance. Add words like 'the', 'a', 'in'.
stopwords.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this stopword?

analyticsRules.description: Custom analytics rules for tracking search metrics.
analyticsRules.name: Name

dynamicSearch.description: Advanced search with dynamic sorting and result diversification.

rankingRules.title: Ranking Rules
rankingRules.description: Configure how search results are ranked and scored for this index.
rankingRules.fieldWeightsHint: Control how much each field contributes to the overall relevance score. Higher weight = more important.
rankingRules.noFieldsHint: Add string fields to the schema first to configure field weights.
rankingRules.generalSettingsHint: Configure typo tolerance, default sorting, and search modes.
rankingRules.customRulesHint: Advanced ranking expressions to override relevance scoring. Applied in order.
rankingRules.noCustomRulesHint: Add custom ranking expressions to fine-tune relevance scoring.

embeddingModel.title: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.description: Configure the embedding model for vector search and auto-embedding.
embeddingModel.enableHint: Automatically generate embeddings for new documents during ingestion.
embeddingModel.hybridAlphaHint: Balance between keyword (0) and vector (1) search. 0.5 = equal weighting.
embeddingModel.azureApiUrlHint: Your Azure OpenAI endpoint URL. e.g. https://{resource}.openai.azure.com/
embeddingModel.error: Failed to save embedding model configuration.
embeddingModel.openaiCompatibleApiUrlHint: Base URL for any OpenAI-compatible embedding API. e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1
embeddingModel.openaiCompatibleApiKeyHint: Optional. Leave blank if your service doesn't require authentication.

spellCorrection.title: Spell Correction
spellCorrection.description: Configure per-index spell correction settings. Control edit distance, language-specific options, and SymSpell behavior.
spellCorrection.error: Failed to save spell correction config.
spellCorrection.maxEditDistanceHint: Higher values catch more typos but may return irrelevant suggestions.
spellCorrection.splitCompoundsHint: Useful for German, Finnish and other compound-rich languages.
spellCorrection.useContextCorrectionHint: Use surrounding words to make better correction decisions.

counterRules.title: Counter Rules
counterRules.description: Increment numeric fields in documents when events occur. Use for popularity-based ranking.
counterRules.createDialogDesc: Configure event-based counter that increments a document field.
counterRules.eventNameHint: Unique name used when tracking events. Leave empty to auto-generate.
counterRules.counterFieldHint: This field must exist in the collection schema as int32 or float.
counterRules.empty: No counter rules configured. Create one to start tracking popular items.
counterRules.name: Name
counterRules.usageHint: Use the counter field in your search query to boost popular results: sort_by: click_count:desc, _text_match:desc
counterRules.required: Please fill in all required fields.
counterRules.deleteConfirmDesc: Remove the counter rule "{name}"? Documents will stop incrementing on events.

widgetConfigurator.settingsDesc: Configure how your search widget looks and behaves.
widgetConfigurator.previewDesc: Preview how your widget will look.
widgetConfigurator.noIndexesDesc: Create a search index first to configure the widget.

autoEmbed.autoEmbedDescription: Automatically generate vector embeddings from text fields during indexing.
autoEmbed.autoEmbedFromHint: Fields to generate embeddings from (e.g., title, description)
autoEmbed.autoEmbedApiKeyHint: Leave empty to use the default provider key
autoEmbed.autoEmbedApiUrlHint: Custom endpoint for OpenAI-compatible embedding services
autoEmbed.autoEmbedWarning: Auto-embedded vectors are recalculated only when source fields change. A full reindex is required for existing documents.

nohitsQueries.title: No-Hit Queries Rules
nohitsQueries.description: Capture search queries that return zero results into a dedicated collection for analysis.
nohitsQueries.createDialogDesc: Log search queries that return zero results into a collection for analysis.
nohitsQueries.destinationHint: Queries with zero results are logged to this collection.
nohitsQueries.createError: Failed to create no-hit queries rule.
nohitsQueries.deleteError: Failed to delete no-hit queries rule.
nohitsQueries.empty: No no-hit queries rules configured. Create one to start capturing zero-result queries.
nohitsQueries.name: Name
nohitsQueries.required: Please fill in all required fields.
nohitsQueries.deleteConfirmDesc: Remove the no-hit queries rule "{name}"? Zero-result queries will stop being collected.
